title: aster trinervis
intro: Aster trinervis, also known as the white heath aster, is a perennial plant in the daisy family native to North America. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds and reducing pain and fever. The health benefits of Aster trinervis include its ability to support immune function, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing, as well as its potential to treat digestive issues and skin conditions. Aster trinervis can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, with the roots and leaves being used in herbal preparations to harness its medicinal properties.
